mapper.select: SELECT * FROM evaluation_periods WHERE deleted = 0 AND status BETWEEN 1 AND 5 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM evaluation_periods WHERE deleted = 0 AND semester_id = #{semesterId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM evaluation_periods WHERE deleted = 0 AND period_code = #{code}

SELECT ep.*, s.semester_name AS semesterName, s.start_date AS semesterStartDate, s.end_date AS semesterEndDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_evaluation_results ser WHERE ser.evaluation_period_id = ep.id) AS resultCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_evaluation_results ser WHERE ser.evaluation_period_id = ep.id AND ser.status = 1) AS calculatedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_honor_application sha WHERE sha.evaluation_period_id = ep.id) AS applicationCount FROM evaluation_periods ep LEFT JOIN semesters s ON ep.semester_id = s.id WHERE ep.id = #{id} AND ep.deleted = 0
